column1: Trea Turner headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks, setting the table atop the Phillies lineup with a steady bat and a juicy platoon edge at home. Turner’s reliable profile and strong 72.3% hit probability make him a no-brainer against Foster Griffin, especially with the friendly park factor in play. Right behind him, Jeremy Pena brings nearly identical upside as Houston’s leadoff man, also enjoying a platoon advantage and a favorable home setting—expect plenty of chances for Pena to do damage. Michael Busch and Jakob Marsee also deserve a look, each leading off with the platoon edge and solid matchups, but Turner’s combination of opportunity and consistency puts him a cut above the rest.
